title: Rustic Argentinian Tomato Stew
description: A hearty and herbal stew featuring diced tomatoes, this dish is a nostalgic representation of Argentinian cuisine, made with kosher-friendly ingredients and prepared using a mortar and pestle.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Using a mortar and pestle, pound the chopped parsley and oregano until they are well combined and fragrant.
Add the pounded herb mixture to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the diced tomatoes, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Pour in the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 30 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional chopped parsley if desired.
